Title: Missing Image Upload on Authentication Pages
Description: Sign up and login pages lack proper image assets and branding logos

Title: Car Listing Confirmation Missing
Description: After seller submits a car listing the system doesn't display confirmation message that request is awaiting admin approval
Evidence: Test case showed no success message returned

Title: Seller Review Feature Not Implemented
Description: Buyers unable to rate and review sellers after completed purchases
Evidence: Feature spec defined but endpoints not deployed

Title: Receipt Generator Missing for Admin
Description: Admin dashboard lacks ability to generate and download purchase receipts for completed orders

Title: Admin Dashboard Analytics Graphs Not Rendering
Description: Dashboard shows statistics but trend graphs and charts fail to display data visualization
Evidence: Graph component throws null pointer exception

Title: Admin Cannot Modify User Profile Details
Description: User management endpoint missing for admins to edit user names email and phone numbers

Title: Insufficient Password Validation Rules
Description: System accepts passwords shorter than required minimum length causing security vulnerability
Evidence: Able to register with 5 character password

Title: Wishlist Persistence Issue
Description: User wishlists not saving properly when browser session ends causing data loss

Title: Payment Gateway Integration Incomplete
Description: Purchase flow fails to properly handle payment responses from simulated gateway
Evidence: Payment status not updating in database

Title: Recent Views Feature Not Tracking
Description: Vehicle view history not being recorded in user session for recent views feature
Evidence: RecentView entity not persisting to database

Title: Car Comparison Missing Condition Fields
Description: Compare endpoint returns basic car details but omits fuel type transmission and owner history

Title: Support Ticket Chat Not Bidirectional
Description: Admin and user unable to exchange multiple messages within single support ticket thread
Evidence: Message list endpoint returns only initial message

Title: Session Token Expiration Not Enforced
Description: User sessions remain active beyond 120 minute timeout period creating security risk
Evidence: Token validation logic missing from interceptor

Title: Car Availability Status Not Updating After Purchase
Description: Purchased cars remain marked as available in catalog allowing duplicate purchase attempts
Evidence: Car available flag not updated in transaction

Title: Fraud Alert Not Triggering for High Purchase Volume
Description: System fails to flag accounts with excessive purchase history as potential fraud risk
Evidence: Alert threshold logic not implemented in purchase service
